title: Brewalot
description: Minecraft texture pack that redesigns potions into fitting drinks. Made for RP servers or decoration. Please read the disclaimer.
body:
![Brewalot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1d5772aec59e9fd696d2c0548cd3ff36a61c7f9.png)
# Brewalot 
**Disclaimer**: This resource pack is designed for **creative and entertainment purposes only**. While it features fictional representations of alcoholic beverages, **it does not promote or encourage the consumption of alcohol in real life**. Please **enjoy responsibly** within the Minecraft universe, and ensure content is appropriate for your audience.


   ![wine devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf815850e0d5d38c6f1d5178fdddb5a4c97b368.png)

   This resourcepack **requires**
**Optifine** or [CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions) for **fabric**
 
      
   
   **Rename** theese potions in the **anvil**:
   
-    Strength potion -> **Whiskey**
- 
-    Night vision potion -> **Vodka**
- 
-    Regeneration potion -> **Rum**
- 
-    Swiftness potion -> **Tequila**
- 
-    Invisibility potion -> **Gin**
- 
-    Slowness potion -> **Beer**
- 
-    Harming potion -> **Absinthe**
- 
-    Poison potion -> **Everclear**
- 
-    Slowfalling potion -> **Red wine**
   
![barreldevider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d652e5b3658676aada3f03284e982a2bf0ccc56b.png)
